---
title: Estimation
description: Estimate unknown quantities from data.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Interpret point estimates.
- Interpret confidence intervals.
- Understand uncertainty in estimates.
:::

An estimate uses sample data to approximate an unknown population quantity.

::: {.key-idea}
A confidence interval communicates both an estimate and uncertainty.
:::

::: {.practice-box}
1. What is a point estimate?
2. Why is an interval usually more informative?
3. What happens to uncertainty with larger samples?
:::
